name: VCBBoardSizeModifier
description: Resize the Virtual Circuit Board board past the default 2048x2048. Adds a 'Board' category to the circuit-editor side panel (between Cursor Info and Inks) with a small Board size field and an Apply button (boards are square). Minimum 2048 with no hard upper cap - the size is effectively unbounded, but bigger boards need a more powerful PC (recommended max 8192); existing content is preserved. The board texture (grid + ink-symbol overlay) grows with the board, and drawing on a large board stays fast (only the changed region is re-uploaded). Compatible with the VCB Multiplayer mod - the size field is mirrored to the other player live as you type, and Apply resizes both boards.
